description: HashSet replaced with List. Membership check goes from O(1) to O(n), overall O(n^2). Stated motivation ('simpler API; avoids a HashSet dependency') is bogus — both are in System.Collections.Generic.

bugs.description: List<string>.Contains is O(n); inside a foreach this is O(n^2). HashSet was correct.
PR claims simpler API / avoids a dependency; HashSet is in the same namespace. The justification doesn't hold.
